author: barnabasbusa
content: <@402080271563751435> were you able to repro the issue where attestations aren't coming in?

author: taulepton_
content: Yeah I managed to repro the issue. I recognise there is a divergence to what I tested in CI integration tests and what we test in Kurtosis in your config. In CI the no EL node is just a full node (not a validator) so it works fine and validates the head using execution proofs. I think for no EL validator we need to change some config validation to get it working as validator node currently has hard requirement for EL.

author: taulepton_
content: It shouldn’t be too difficult to change. By the way the interop (with EL) between LH and prysm looks good. <@531934490826768418>
